member.name: T:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.ClabesController
member.summary: Provides API endpoints for generating valid fake CLABE account numbers according to Mexican banking standards.
member.remarks: This controller is part of API version 1 and is intended for use in scenarios where a valid CLABE number is required for testing or demonstration purposes. The controller depends on a CLABE service, which is injected via constructor. All endpoints are accessible under the 'api/Clabes' route.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.ClabesController.#ctor(Utilidades.Servicios.ClabeServicio)
member.summary: Contructor del controlador de clabes, se inyecta el servicio de clabes

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.ClabesController.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Genera un cuenta clabe fake valida con los estandadres de México

member.name: T:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.CurpController
member.summary: controller para el curp

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.CurpController.GenerarCurp(Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp)
member.summary: Genera el curp
member.param: Sexo: m / h. m para mujer, h para hombre. Para el estado: Aguascalientes, Baja_California, Baja_California_Sur, Campeche, Coahuila, Colima, Chiapas, Chihuahua, Distrito_Federal, Durango, Guanajuato, Guerrero, Hidalgo, Jalisco, Mexico, Michoacan, Morelos, Nayarit, Nuevo_Leon, Oaxaca, Puebla, Queretaro, Quintana_Roo, San_Luis_Potosi, Sinaloa, Sonora, Tabasco, Tamaulipas, Tlaxcala, Veracruz, Yucatan, Zacatecas, Extranjero

member.name: P:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp.Nombres
member.summary: Gets or sets the first names of the person.
member.remarks: The value is required and cannot exceed 50 characters in length.

member.name: P:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp.PrimerApellido
member.summary: Gets or sets the first surname of the person.
member.remarks: The value is required and must not exceed 50 characters in length.

member.name: P:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp.SegundoApellido
member.summary: Gets or sets the second surname of the person.

member.name: P:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp.FechaDeNacimiento
member.summary: Gets or sets the date of birth.

member.name: P:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp.Sexo
member.summary: H, M

member.name: P:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.SolicitudDeCurp.Estado
member.summary: Aguascalientes, Baja_California, Baja_California_Sur, Campeche, Coahuila, Colima, Chiapas, Chihuahua, Distrito_Federal, Durango, Guanajuato, Guerrero, Hidalgo, Jalisco, Mexico, Michoacan, Morelos, Nayarit, Nuevo_Leon, Oaxaca, Puebla, Queretaro, Quintana_Roo, San_Luis_Potosi, Sinaloa, Sonora, Tabasco, Tamaulipas, Tlaxcala, Veracruz, Yucatan, Zacatecas, Extranjero

member.name: T:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.EstadoValidoAttribute
member.summary: Provides a validation attribute that ensures a string value corresponds to a valid key in the Estado enumeration.
member.remarks: Use this attribute to validate that a property or field contains a valid Estado value. The validation is case-insensitive and requires the value to be non-empty. If the value is not a valid Estado key, a validation error is returned listing all valid keys.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.EstadoValidoAttribute.IsValid(System.Object,System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.ValidationContext)
member.summary: Validates that the provided value is a non-empty string corresponding to a valid key in the Estado enumeration.
member.remarks: The validation is case-insensitive and requires the value to match one of the defined Estado enumeration names. If the value is null, empty, or whitespace, validation fails and an error message is returned.
member.param: The value to validate. Must be a non-empty string representing a key in the Estado enumeration.
The context information about the validation operation, including the object instance and metadata.
member.returns: A ValidationResult indicating success if the value is a valid Estado key; otherwise, a ValidationResult with an error message describing the validation failure.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.DireccionesController.ObtenerDirecciones(System.Int32)
member.summary: Otiene una dirección valida con coordenadas, es una colección de direcciones de bibliotecas en México

member.summary: Guid 32 caracteres, idMongoDb 24 caracteres, idFirebase 20 caracteres

member.name: T:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.PizzasController
member.summary: Provides API endpoints for retrieving menu categories, pizzas, sizes, dough types, chicken products, additionals, beverages, and for managing client information in the pizza ordering application.
member.remarks: This controller exposes RESTful endpoints for accessing menu data and client operations. All endpoints return JSON responses and are grouped under the 'v1' API version. Client management endpoints support adding new clients and are designed to facilitate integration with authentication mechanisms. Endpoints are intended for use in web and mobile applications interacting with the pizza ordering system.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.PizzasController.#ctor(VMtz84.Pizzas.Services.PizzaService,JwtToken.Services.JwtTokenService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PizzasController class with the specified pizza and JWT token services.
member.param: The service used to manage pizza-related operations.
The service used to handle JWT token generation and validation.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.PizzasController.GetMenu
member.summary: Retrieves the list of available menu categories for the application.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.PizzasController.GetPizzas
member.summary: Retrieves the list of available pizzas for the application.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.PizzasController.GetTamanios
member.summary: Retrieves the list of available sizes for the application.

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.PizzasController.GetMasas

member.summary: Retrieves the list of available chickens for the application.

member.summary: Retrieves the list of available additionals for the application.

member.summary: Retrieves the list of available beberages for the application.

member.summary: Controller del rfc

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.RfcController.GenerarRfcConHomoclave(Utilidades.Servicios.Dtos.RfcDto)
member.summary: Genera el rfc con homoclave, deacuedo con el algoritmo del SAT. Fisica = 0, Moral = 1

member.name: M:Utilidades.Api.Controllers.TarjetasDeDebitoController.Get
member.summary: Genera un número de tarjeta de débito válido según el algoritmo de Luhn y las convenciones de numeración de tarjetas.o

member.name: T:Utilidades.Api.Dtos.IdDto
member.summary: Represents a data transfer object containing an identifier, a message, and a timestamp.
member.remarks: This class is typically used to encapsulate simple response information, such as an operation result or status, including an optional identifier and message. The timestamp is set to the current date and time when the object is created.
